description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> chance to reduce the cooldown of <color=#28d9ed>The Culprit is You!</color> by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>범인은 바로 당신!</color> 스킬의 쿨타임을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>【犯人はあなたです!】</color>のスキルターンを<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>減少させる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>的几率使<color=#28d9ed>犯人就是你!</color>的技能冷却时间减少<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: (Trigger Effect) When an ally uses an AoE attack, increases Attack of all allies for <color=#28d9ed>2</color> turns, and increases Priority of Mage allies by <color=#28d9ed>40%</color>.
description.kr: (발동 효과) 아군이 전체 공격을 했을 때, 아군 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color>동안 공격력을 증가시키고, 아군의 마법형 캐릭터는 행동 게이지가 <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> 증가합니다.
description.jp: (発動効果)味方が全体攻撃を行った時、味方全体の攻撃力を<color=#28d9ed>2</color>ターン増加し、味方の魔法型キャラの行動ゲージを<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>増加。
description.zh: (触发效果)当我方使用群体攻击时,使全体我方攻击力增加<color=#28d9ed>2</color>回合,并使我方<color=#28d9ed>魔法型角色</color>的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>增加<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and increases <color=#28d9ed>Critical Damage</color> of all allies for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color>.\nAfter using the skill, decreases cooldown of <color=#28d9ed>Thinking Time</color> by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>치명 피해</color>를 증가시킵니다.\n스킬 사용 후 <color=#28d9ed>씽킹 타임</color> 스킬의 쿨타임을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>会心ダメージ</color>をUPさせる。\nスキル使用後、<color=#28d9ed>シンキングタイム</color>のスキルターンを<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>減少させる。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并使我方全体的<color=#28d9ed>暴击伤害</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。\n使用技能后,使<color=#28d9ed>思考时间</color>技能的冷却时间减少<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。
